matrix.source_signal: Known issues Smart Contracts (Optimism), last updated 12 June 2025.
matrix.required_check: A candidate must be compared against Optimism's smart-contract known issues before any code review or draft report.

matrix.source_signal: Known issues Blockchain / DLT (Optimism), last updated 12 June 2025.
matrix.required_check: A candidate must be compared against Optimism's Blockchain/DLT known issues before promotion.

matrix.source_signal: op-reth depends on crates from paradigmxyz/reth; public upstream reth or Ethereum Foundation disclosures cannot be replayed against Optimism.
matrix.required_check: Search upstream reth and Ethereum Foundation disclosure/bug-bounty status before treating an op-reth issue as Optimism-eligible.

matrix.source_signal: All currently known issues with devp2p are linked as out-of-scope reference.
matrix.required_check: Any networking/devp2p claim must be compared against Ethereum devp2p known issues first.

matrix.source_signal: Vulnerabilities requiring public JSON-RPC or Beacon API exposure are out of scope.
matrix.required_check: Reject any candidate whose exploit condition depends on a user/operator exposing public RPC/API endpoints.

matrix.source_signal: Chain-operator violation of recommended best practices is out of scope.
matrix.required_check: Reject configuration-only or network-topology-only claims unless there is an independent code vulnerability.

matrix.source_signal: Alt-DA feature of op-node and op-batcher is out of scope.
matrix.required_check: Reject candidates whose impact depends on the Alt-DA feature.

matrix.source_signal: Execution layer clients that reached end-of-service, e.g. op-geth, are out of scope.
matrix.required_check: Reject op-geth/end-of-service-client candidates unless the program rules change.

matrix.source_signal: Third-party custom token bridge implementation vulnerabilities are out of scope.
matrix.required_check: Separate canonical bridge protocol behavior from third-party custom token bridge bugs and token misconfiguration.

matrix.source_signal: Bugs in op-challenger that result in 'Incorrectly resolved dispute game, detected by op-dispute-mon' are out of scope due to existing detection/remediation ability.
matrix.required_check: Any dispute-game candidate must prove it is not already detected/resolved by op-dispute-mon.

matrix.source_signal: Proof-of-whale based attacks on Fault Proofs are out of scope.
matrix.required_check: Reject proof-of-whale style claims before any deeper review.

matrix.source_signal: Fake ERC20 withdrawal against L1StandardBridge is documented as prevented; only a bypass of protections would be rewardable.
matrix.required_check: Reject reports that restate the documented fake-token bridge issue without a new bypass.

matrix.source_signal: ResolvedDelegateProxy.sol storage slot collision bug is documented as not affecting Optimism.
matrix.required_check: Reject storage-slot-collision claims that depend on the documented non-impactful layout condition.

matrix.source_signal: ETH deposited to OptimismPortal by an L1 contract can be irrecoverably stranded in a documented edge case.
matrix.required_check: Reject direct restatements of the documented L1 contract deposit edge case; only a distinct bypass/impact may proceed.

matrix.source_signal: Large data or gas-specific cross-chain messages can create documented griefing requiring an upgrade.
matrix.required_check: Reject gas/data griefing restatements unless a new eligible critical/high impact is shown.

matrix.source_signal: Deposit transactions can be griefed by filling MAX_RESOURCE_LIMIT; PR 5064 partially mitigates and fuller fix requires architecture changes.
matrix.required_check: Reject MAX_RESOURCE_LIMIT griefing restatements unless the candidate demonstrates a new bypass or greater impact.

matrix.source_signal: Bridge foot guns from token misconfiguration, fee-on-transfer, rebasing tokens, or local/remote OptimismMintable mismatch are documented.
matrix.required_check: Reject user/developer/token configuration foot guns unless protocol code creates a new in-scope impact.

matrix.source_signal: Listed Optimism domains are out of scope; Agora-operated vote.optimism.io and atlas.optimism.io route to Agora unless direct protocol financial impact exists.
matrix.required_check: Confirm the web asset is in the in-scope table and not in the out-of-scope list before even considering a report-quality review.

matrix.source_signal: Self-exploited damage, leaked keys, privileged-address-only attacks, external stablecoin depegging, best-practice recommendations, feature requests, test/config files, phishing, and social engineering are out of scope.
matrix.required_check: A candidate must pass all default out-of-scope filters before any draft report.

matrix.source_signal: Mainnet/public testnet testing, pricing-oracle or third-party testing, phishing/social engineering, third-party browser-extension/system testing, denial of service, automated traffic, and public disclosure are prohibited.
matrix.required_check: No live testing path may start without a separate allowed-scope, local-fork, runtime, browser, and submission gate.

matrix.source_signal: Immunefi feasibility limitation standards include chain rollbacks, pre-impact monitoring, attack investment amount, attacks with financial risk to attacker, and griefing downgrade standards.
matrix.required_check: Impact claims must include feasibility notes and downgrade risks before any report draft.
